package rulecoverage

func PositiveContextStoredInStructField() string {
    ruleID := "context_stored_in_struct_field"
    family := "context"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Struct fields that store context.Context instead of keeping context request-scoped through method parameters."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
